_publications._publicationTitle: A haploinsufficiency restoration strategy corrects neurobehavioral deficits in Nf1+/- mice.

_contextSnippet: FBXW11 and FBXO3 depletion by RNAi in HeLa cells also stabilized neurofibromin and suppressed constitutive phosphorylation of the Ras effectors ERK1 and ERK2
details: FBXW11 and FBXO3 depletion by RNAi stabilized neurofibromin and suppressed constitutive phosphorylation of ERK1 and ERK2
